---
name: Bug report
about: Something is wrong
labels: bug
---

## What did you try to do?

Plain-English description of what you were trying to accomplish.

## What did GitEasy say?

Paste the error message you saw. If it ended with `Details: <log-path>`, please attach the log file too.

## What did you expect to happen?

## Environment

- GitEasy version (run `(Get-Module GitEasy).Version`):
- PowerShell version (run `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion`):
- Operating system:
- Git version (run `git --version`):

## Diagnostic log

Attach the relevant log file from `Show-Diagnostic` or paste the contents here.
